skill.name: maxhub-bilibili
skill.description: B站视频、用户、评论、弹幕、直播数据查询助手。支持App和Web双端API。
skill.summary: Query Bilibili videos, users, comments, danmaku, and live data through the MaxHub API.
skill.author: maxhub

security_audit.summary: This skill is a legitimate Bilibili data API wrapper that uses curl to query the MaxHub API. Static analysis flagged 460 potential issues, but the vast majority are false positives: 200+ 'weak cryptographic algorithm' findings and 80+ 'system reconnaissance' findings are all triggered by markdown API documentation files showing endpoint parameters and response formats, not executable code. Confirmed true positives involve expected behavior for an API wrapper skill: (1) external command execution via curl to make API calls, (2) environment variable access for MAXHUB_API_KEY, and (3) network requests to aconfig.cn. The dangerous combination heuristic is triggered but reflects legitimate API usage. The skill documents read-only behavior and all traffic targets a single documented endpoint.

high_findings.title: External command execution with credential access and network transmission
high_findings.description: The skill executes curl commands that transmit MAXHUB_API_KEY as a Bearer token to an external API endpoint. This dangerous combination of code execution, network access, and credential exposure is the skill's core mechanism but carries risk if the API service is compromised.

medium_findings.title: Environment variable accessed for API authentication
medium_findings.description: The skill reads MAXHUB_API_KEY from the environment and uses it in HTTP Authorization headers for curl requests to aconfig.cn. This is expected for API-based skills but the credential is transmitted over the network.

medium_findings.title: Autonomous external command execution via curl
medium_findings.description: The skill instructs the AI to autonomously execute curl commands to call Bilibili API endpoints. This allows dynamic network requests based on user queries, which is the intended behavior but carries command injection risk if user input is not sanitized.

low_findings.title: Hardcoded URLs in skill documentation
low_findings.description: Multiple hardcoded URLs reference the MaxHub API service at aconfig.cn. These are legitimate API endpoints for the skill's intended functionality and not indicators of malicious behavior.

dangerous_patterns.title: Combined code execution, network access, and credential transmission
dangerous_patterns.description: The skill pattern combines curl execution (external_commands) with MAXHUB_API_KEY (env_access) transmitted to aconfig.cn (network). This is a legitimate API integration pattern but matches the heuristic for dangerous behavior combinations. The risk is mitigated by single-endpoint targeting and documented read-only behavior.

content.user_title: Query Bilibili videos, users, comments, and live data
content.value_statement: Analyzing Bilibili content requires navigating complex and rate-limited APIs. This skill provides a unified query interface to access video, user, comment, and live streaming data through the MaxHub API.
actual_capabilities: Query Bilibili video details, play URLs, subtitles, and danmaku data
Search for users and retrieve their profile, videos, and engagement statistics
Search Bilibili content by keyword with sorting and filtering options
Retrieve video comments, reply threads, and dynamic feed data
Query live streaming areas and active streamers
Fetch popular feeds, bangumi tabs, and category recommendations
limitations: Requires a valid MAXHUB_API_KEY from aconfig.cn to function
Some Bilibili endpoints require session cookies which carry additional privacy risk
Read-only data queries only - cannot post comments or modify content
API rate limits may restrict frequent or bulk data requests

use_cases.title: Content creator research
use_cases.description: Analyze UP主 (Bilibili creators) by searching their profile, viewing their video list, and examining engagement statistics to evaluate collaboration potential.

use_cases.title: Video performance analysis
use_cases.description: Retrieve video details, comments, and danmaku for a specific Bilibili video to understand audience reaction and content performance.
use_cases.target_user: Content creators and social media analysts

use_cases.title: Trend discovery and research
use_cases.description: Search Bilibili by keyword with sorting options, fetch popular feeds, and explore trending content across categories to identify emerging topics.

prompt_templates.title: Search for Bilibili videos
prompt_templates.prompt: Search for Bilibili videos about [topic or keyword] and show me the top results with view counts and likes.
prompt_templates.scenario: A user wants to find popular videos on a specific topic

prompt_templates.title: Get UP主 profile
prompt_templates.prompt: Look up Bilibili creator [UP主 name or ID] and show me their profile, total video count, and engagement statistics.
prompt_templates.scenario: A user wants to research a specific Bilibili content creator

prompt_templates.title: Analyze video engagement
prompt_templates.prompt: Get the video details for [video URL or BV ID], fetch the most recent comments, and analyze the overall sentiment and engagement patterns.
prompt_templates.scenario: A content analyst wants to evaluate a video performance

prompt_templates.title: Multi-endpoint deep dive
prompt_templates.prompt: Search for the top 5 most popular videos about [topic], then for each video fetch its detailed stats, recent comments, and danmaku data. Present a comparison table with engagement metrics.
prompt_templates.scenario: An advanced user wants comprehensive competitive analysis

output_examples.input: Show me the most popular Bilibili videos about AI technology
output_examples.output:
Here are the top Bilibili videos about AI technology:

| Title | UP主 | Views | Likes |
|-------|------|-------|-------|
| AI Painting Tutorial for Beginners | TechZhang | 1.2M | 85K |
| Deep Learning Explained Simply | AI Academy | 980K | 62K |

Key findings: The most popular AI content focuses on practical tutorials rather than theory. The top video has a 7.1% like-to-view ratio.

output_examples.input: Analyze UP主 TechDaily and their recent videos
output_examples.output:
UP主 Profile: TechDaily
- Total videos: 342
- Total views: 28.5M
- Followers: 856K

Recent video performance:
| Video | Views | Likes | Comments |
|-------|-------|-------|----------|
| iPhone 16 Review | 520K | 32K | 1,245 |
| Samsung S25 Unboxing | 380K | 21K | 892 |

Insight: Engagement rate averages 6.2%, above the category average of 4.1%. The audience prefers in-depth reviews over unboxing content.

best_practices: Configure your MAXHUB_API_KEY before making requests using environment variables or OpenClaw config for secure credential management.
Start with simple single-endpoint queries to verify API access before combining multiple endpoints for complex analysis.
Review the API endpoint reference files to understand required parameters and response formats before constructing queries.
anti_patterns: Do not embed API keys directly in prompts or messages. Use the configured environment variable instead.
Avoid requesting session cookies unless absolutely necessary. Prefer API tokens with limited scope when possible.
Do not make excessive parallel requests that could trigger rate limiting. Space out bulk queries with delays.

faq.question: What is the MaxHub Bilibili skill?
faq.answer: It is a skill that lets you query Bilibili data including videos, users, comments, danmaku, and live streams through the MaxHub API.

faq.question: How do I get an API key?
faq.answer: Sign up at https://www.aconfig.cn, go to your dashboard, and create an API key. Then set it as the MAXHUB_API_KEY environment variable.

faq.question: Does this skill support Chinese?
faq.answer: Yes. The skill supports both English and Chinese output. It detects your language and responds in that language.

faq.question: Can this skill post comments or upload videos?
faq.answer: No. The skill is designed for read-only data queries only. It cannot modify content on Bilibili.

faq.question: Is my API key safe?
faq.answer: Your API key is sent to the MaxHub API service at aconfig.cn for authentication. The documentation states keys are not stored beyond request handling.

faq.question: What data can I query?
faq.answer: You can query video details, user profiles, comments, danmaku, search results, popular feeds, live stream information, and various Bilibili categories.
